notes: Cross-referenced to OSM via sameAs. Coordinates taken from the OSM node.

@graph.name: Old Dutch Inn
@graph.description: Boutique hotel in the heart of the historic Dutch-founded Village of Kinderhook.
@graph.kh:affectiveRegister: The village's canonical lodging. Rooms in a house whose exterior has been there long enough to orient the rest of the street.

kh:codeReview.method: Inn fronts the village square (Broad Street side) at the historic commercial core. OSM cross-reference (node 10873536573) confirms location. Visual inspection of Village Zoning Map and CPEA 2008 HD overlay map.
kh:codeReview.implications: Exterior alterations require a certificate of appropriateness from the Historic Preservation Commission per Village Code Ch. 75. The building is itself a contributing structure to the Village character that the overlay protects.
